portfolio.name: twinbuilding
portfolio.title: Twin Building Engineering Design & Services
portfolio.description: A visual framework for precision engineering.

challenge.text: Twin Building needed an identity that communicated technical precision and trust while still feeling contemporary. The existing visual language lacked consistency across touchpoints, which made the brand feel fragmented.

strategy.text: The approach focused on building a strong typographic hierarchy, a restrained color system, and repeatable layout rules. Every choice was guided by clarity, structure, and ease of application across print and digital assets.

execution.text: The visual system was translated into core brand materials, presentation templates, and communication pieces. The design language emphasized clean geometry, deliberate spacing, and disciplined visual rhythm.

result.text: The final identity established a coherent and professional brand presence. It improved recognition, made materials easier to produce consistently, and positioned Twin Building as a reliable engineering partner.

metadata.title: Twin Building Engineering Design & Services
metadata.description: Case study on identity and visual system design for an engineering firm.

portfolio.name: fnua
portfolio.title: FNÚA Fashion
portfolio.description: A comprehensive identity system for luxury fashion.

challenge.text: FNÚA required a brand expression that felt premium yet approachable across campaigns and editorial assets. The challenge was to balance elegance with clarity while preserving a distinct point of view.

strategy.text: The strategy centered on expressive typography, refined spacing, and a restrained visual system that could adapt to seasonal collections. Consistency and flexibility were treated as equal priorities.

execution.text: The system was applied across lookbook directions, social compositions, and supporting branded materials. Layout structures and image treatment rules were defined to keep outputs cohesive.

result.text: FNÚA gained a unified and recognizable visual identity that translated smoothly across channels. The brand now presents a stronger narrative and a more confident market presence.

metadata.title: FNÚA Fashion
metadata.description: Case study on fashion branding with sustainable direction and expressive typography.
